subcodes.first_line: We make mention of those who have immersed themselves in the ocean of divine knowledge during the days of the All-Merciful and have turned their faces toward the Countenance when [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر الذین تغمسوا فی بحر العرفان فی ایام الرحمن و توجهوا الی الوجه اذ
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @thankfulness; gratitude
